macro.title: July rate hike should be off the table with big June inflation miss
macro.what: June CPI declined 0.4% and ran 3.5% year over year, and flat monthly inflation weakens the argument for a July hike.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: June inflation fell, cooling Fed rate hike expectations
macro.what: Inflation slowed in June amid a now-defunct Middle East ceasefire, casting doubt on a potential Federal Reserve rate hike next week.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates to Fall as Cooler-Than-Expected Inflation Report Lowers Odds of a July Fed Rate Hike
macro.what: Takeaway: Rates will fall today after an unexpectedly soft CPI inflation reading that will keep the Fed from hiking at the July 29th meeting
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: U.S. Pending Home Sales Rise to Highest Level in 6 Weeks

housing.title: Is Kelley Blue Book another company coming for your commission?

housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Higher home-care spending by states linked to greater aging-in-place outcomes

notables.title: Single-family investor restrictions take effect under ROAD Act
